Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Pulls a complete inventory picture for the vehicle in seconds, replacing what would otherwise require manual catalog cross-referencing across multiple SKUs.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats the Dream inventory results into a clean, structured Excel-ready output, clearly separating what DFC stocks from what is missing, with consistent labeling.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a polished, presentation-ready catalog file that Mark can send to customers or use internally, removing manual spreadsheet formatting work.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel catalog file as an attachment, ready to use or forward to the customer.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark's inbox within minutes of submission, cutting a process that previously took hours of manual lookup down to near-zero effort.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, returning on-hand quantities, on-order quantities, and in-transit details for each line item.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, saving hours of duplicated effort every week and ensuring everyone is working from the same data.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches each backorder line item with the live Dream inventory data, flags parts with no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source as dead-ends, and produces an updated report.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into an actionable triage document, so the team immediately knows which orders can be resolved and which need escalation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communication emails for flagged backorder lines, pre-populated with the part status, expected resolution, and appropriate messaging tone.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Cuts the time to communicate order delays from hours of individual rep drafting to a review-and-send workflow, improving customer response time and consistency.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all listed two-piece rotor fitments by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitor fitment reference in a fraction of the time it would take to manually browse and transcribe three separate catalogs.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify which two-piece rotor applications DFC already covers and which are gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly maps the competitive landscape against DFC's own inventory, giving Dino a clear picture of where DFC is competitive and where there is opportunity to expand.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to relevant customers asking about their demand for specific two-piece rotor applications identified as gaps in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signal from the market automatically, replacing manual outreach and giving the product team data to prioritize which gaps to fill first.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped fitments, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino one consolidated, decision-ready document instead of raw data across multiple sources, directly supporting catalog expansion prioritization.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields — headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs — pulling the full text of every live ad into the workflow.
Meta Investigation.impact: Covers the entire active ad library in one automated pass, ensuring no ad is missed regardless of how many campaigns or ad sets are running.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all pulled ad copy for the specified target phrases, identifies exact matches, and tags each result with the ad ID, campaign name, and the specific field where the match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a flagged phrase across potentially hundreds of ads in seconds, replacing what could be hours of manual copy review with a precise, documented output.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted flagged-copy report listing every ad where a target phrase was found, including the exact field and the verbatim copy excerpt for each match.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts a complete, audit-ready findings list directly in the requester's inbox on demand, enabling rapid compliance review or copy corrections without any manual digging.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is in strong shape, with 28 of 55 total agents completed, 9 currently in progress, and 18 more planned for future development. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages, so the team remains focused on advancing the work already underway. With more than half the pipeline now completed and nearly a fifth actively being built out, we're maintaining solid momentum across marketing, sales, support, and operations. Great work to everyone contributing — the pipeline continues to grow into a powerful engine for the team!
